title: SonicWall Gateway Anti-Virus Detections by Signature Family (SonicWall)
spl:
index=netfw sourcetype="dell:sonicwall:firewall" earliest=-24h
| search "Gateway Anti-Virus" OR GAV OR virus OR malware
| rex field=_raw "(?i)signature[\s:]+(?<sig>[^,\n]+)"
| stats count by sig, src_ip, dst_ip
| sort -count
description: Gateway AV catches malware at the perimeter before it reaches endpoints. Clustering by signature family shows active campaigns versus one-off alerts.
value: Reduces dwell time for commodity malware and supports threat-intel feedback to the SOC.
implementation: Ensure GAV alerts include file hash and signature name. Correlate with email logs if HTTP downloads follow suspicious SMTP.
visualization: Pie chart (signature families), timeline (detection rate), table (src, dest, hash).

references.title: Splunkbase — Dell SonicWall Add-on for Splunk
Splunk Connect for Syslog — Dell SonicWall reference

grandmaExplanation: Gateway AV catches malware at the perimeter before it reaches endpoints — we monitor SonicWall logs so teams can act before users feel pain.
